channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260417)
item.description:
What's New

fix: resolve window title race condition in AXObserver focus detection

Dual-layer protection ensures window title rules apply correctly when

switching channels/groups in apps like Slack:

Layer 1: Register kAXTitleChangedNotification with 150ms debounce

Layer 2: Delayed title verification 250ms after focus change

Both layers share performTitleChangeRedetection() with lastDetectedTitle

guard to avoid duplicate work. Zero impact on typing latency.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
